sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this Tier 3 game

special_mechanics.name: Forward Scrolling Rail Shooter Movement
special_mechanics.description: Jack's movement cannot be stopped due to constant screen scrolling, but player can speed up or slow down pace. Limited horizontal movement during normal gameplay.

special_mechanics.name: Free Movement - Boss Battles
special_mechanics.description: During Serpentbeast boss encounters at end of each world, Jack can move freely in all directions without scrolling constraints.

special_mechanics.name: Jump Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Primary action to dodge canyons and enemies. Used throughout gameplay.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Movement system is rail-shooter based with variable speed control rather than traditional character platformer mechanics. Exact gravity, jump velocity, and acceleration values not available in public documentation.
